info.name: Maypass Workspace
info.description: This API is primarily to connect the Maypass workspace platform backend with the frontend or in the future the Mobile Application.

item.name: System Admin
Authentication
Forgot password

request.description:
This end point requires the following form fields.

- email
    

When this request is sent, An email containing an OTP is sent to the provided email, provided it has been previously registered.

This end point requires the following form fields.

- email
    
- otp
    

When this request is sent successfully, an email is sent to the site owner's email. This will contain a generated password for the system admin. The site owner can then share the password with the system admin that requested for it.

item.description: This folder contain password reset end points. To change a password, you need to first use the send Otp end point first before the verify otp end point.

request.description:
This is the basic System admin login url. it requires the following fields

- email
    
- password
    

on successful login, a token is generated and returned
This url is available to only logged in system admins. You only need to set the Authorization header with they token of the system admin that wants to logout.

This end point requires three fields as well as a bearer token. Only logged in system admins can use this.

- current_password
    
- new_password
    
- new_password_confirmation

item.description:
This folder contains all system admin authentication end points. They include

- Login
    
- Log out
    
- Change Password
    
- A folder that contains password reset end points

item.name: Roles

request.description:
The end point requires the following form fields.

- role
    
- create_tenant
    
- update_tenant
    
- delete_tenant
    
- view_tenant
    
- view_tenant_income
    

It is important to note that apart from the role field which is the name you want to name the role you intend to create, the rest are enums that accepts either "yes" or "no"

picking "yes" in these fields means that system admins with that particular role assigned to them will be able to perform that function.
This is to get all created roles. Only a system admin can view this. It requires a token.

If you decide to change certain permissions of a system admin role, use this. The end point requires the following form fields.

- role
    
- create_tenant
    
- update_tenant
    
- delete_tenant
    
- view_tenant
    
- view_tenant_income

This is to delete a role. it requires this field.

- id

item.description:
This folder contains 5 endpoints the handles the management of role and setting appropriate permissions.

Note that only the system admin with the role "owner" can use all these endpoints except the end points for reading.

item.name: SystemAdmin management

request.description:
To create a system Admin, you need the following fields

- first_name
    
- last_name
    
- role_id (you cannot create an admin with the role, "owner" so you won't be able to use an id of "1" in this field)
    
- email
    

when you do this, an email is sent to the email provided. The email will contain login details for the created system admin.

To update a system Admin, you need the following fields

- first_name
    
- last_name
    
- role_id (you cannot update an admin role to owner so you won't be able to use an id of "1" in this field)
    
- email
    

when you do this, an email is sent to the email provided. The email will contain login details for the created system admin.
This is to view all system admins
This is to view a particular system admin. You need the id of the system admin you intent to view.
This is for system admins to view their own details

item.description: This folder contain end points for system admin management. Only the system admin with the role "owner" is authorized to use these end points. The read end point can be accessed by all admins.

item.name: Tenant Management

request.description:
When a new company is registered, That company is added as a new tenant. The name of the company without spaces or caps becomes the slug.

On registering the company, an email will be sent to the provided email address. This email address will contain a generated password that should be changed and also a login link that will look something like “baseurl/{slug}/login”

This end point can only be used by system admins that have permission to create tenants. It requires the following fields to be sent as raw Json

- company_name
    
- first_name
    
- last_name
    
- email
    
- phone
    
- company_no_location
    
- company_countries (This accepts an array)
    

These fields will populate both the tenant and users table with the appropriate information.

This end point can only be used by system admins that have permission to update tenants. It requires the following fields to be sent as raw Json

- company_name
    
- company_no_location
    
- company_countries (This accepts an array)
This is to fetch a single tenant by id. This can only be accessed by system admins that have the permission to view tenants.
This is to fetch all tenants. This can only be accessed by system admins that have the permission to view tenants.

This is to delete a tenant. This can only be accessed by system admins that have the permission to delete tenants. It requires the form field

- id

item.description: This folder contains all the end points for tenant management

item.name: Subscription Management

request.description:
This end point is used to subscribe a tenant/company to a particular plan after they must have paid for the plan. Any system admin can do this. The fields requied are:

- tenant_id (this is the id of the tenant you want to subscribe to the plan)
    
- plan_id
To view all subscriptions
To view a particular subscription

This is to delete a subscription. This can only be accessed by all system admins. It requires the form field

- id

item.description: This folder contains end points for subscribing a tenant to a plan.

item.name: Plan Management

request.description:
Only the system admin with the role ID of "owner (1)" is authorized to use this end point. It requires the following fields:

- name
    
- price
    
- duration(note that this is in number of months)

Again, only the system admin with the role ID of "owner (1)" is authorized to use this end point. It requires the following fields:

- name
    
- price
    
- duration(note that this is in number of months)
To view all plans
To view a particular plan

This is to delete a plan. Only the system admin with the role of "owner" is authorized to do this. It requires the form field

- id

item.description: This contains five end points for all CRUD functions for Plan table
The system Administrator is the highest form of administrator in this project. This Administrator can see everything on the app and from all tenants.

item.name: Tenants

request.description:
This url is used by tenants with the type of Owner or admin to register new regular users or admins.

- For Admin, user_type_id = 2
    
- for user, user_type_id = 3

formdata.src: /C:/Users/user/Desktop/The August intake is open for Edinburgh Napier University give us a call today.png

formdata.value:
I hope this message finds you well.

This email is to inform you that your recent request has been successfully reviewed and approved. Please find the relevant details attached to this message for your reference.

If you have any questions or require further clarification, feel free to reach out.

Thank you for your cooperation.

request.description: This url is the base tenant login url.
This url is available to only logged in tenant users. maypass in this link is the tenant slug. replace it with the tenant slug you want to log into.

This route is for all tenant user types to request OTP to change their password. You will just need to provide your email. An email containing an OTP code will be sent to your registered email. You will use this code in the next endpoint.
The Otp code sent to the provided email will be filled here along with the email, password and password confirmation

item.description: Note that the person with the first name, last name, email and phone supplied with a registered company name becomes the owner of the company on the platform and so becomes the owner with all the privileges for that particular tenant. "Tenant Slug" is the company name without spaces and caps. eg if i register "Maypass Workspace" as a company name, the tenant slug for that company becomes "maypassworkspace".
